name: [BUG-OT-007] TC-OT-015 — GET /api/v1/token with Accept: text/html returns 500 (must be 406)
description:
**[KNOWN BUG — BUG-OT-007]**

**What this test does:**
Sends GET /api/v1/token with "Accept: text/html" to test content negotiation. The service only produces application/json, so it should return 406 Not Acceptable.

**Expected:** HTTP 406 Not Acceptable
**Actual:** HTTP 500 Internal Server Error

**Root Cause:** The service does not handle the HttpMediaTypeNotAcceptableException thrown by Spring when it cannot satisfy the Accept header. The exception propagates to the global error handler and is returned as a generic 500.

**Impact:** API clients that probe content types receive a misleading 500 error. Automated API scanners may flag this as a server crash rather than a normal negotiation failure.
descriptionHtml:
[KNOWN BUG — BUG-OT-007]

What this test does:
Sends GET /api/v1/token with "Accept: text/html" to test content negotiation. The service only produces application/json, so it should return 406 Not Acceptable.

Expected: HTTP 406 Not Acceptable
Actual: HTTP 500 Internal Server Error

Root Cause: The service does not handle the HttpMediaTypeNotAcceptableException thrown by Spring when it cannot satisfy the Accept header. The exception propagates to the global error handler and is returned as a generic 500.

Impact: API clients that probe content types receive a misleading 500 error. Automated API scanners may flag this as a server crash rather than a normal negotiation failure.
